subject: 3D denoising - output black reconstruction
body:
Hi all,

Does anyone have experience with using 3D denoising to denoise tomograms 
with noise2map? I ran it on one tomogram with the following command

noise2map --observation1 even --observation2 odd --dont_flatten_spectrum 
> --iterations 15000 --batchsize 1 --gpuid_network 0 --gpuid_preprocess 0
>

This seemed to work fine, giving the following output...

Adjusting the number of iterations to 60000 to match different batch size.

However the final denoised tomogram is black. I don't think this is a 
memory issue (enough memory free during both training and denoising), have 
I made a silly mistake?

Best,

Alister
